name: 70"x70" Tablecloth Black/White Weave - Threshold™
description:
Lend a beautifully textured look to your tablescape with the Weave Tablecloth from Threshold™. The rectangular table runner is adorned with subtle weave pattern in black and white for a lovely, textured look, making it perfect for everyday dining or casual entertaining. Made from 100% cotton, this rectangular tablecloth helps protect the table surface from spills, and it can be machine washed for easy upkeep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
